docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS ARMANDO B CABRERA AND MELISSA CABRERA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEVAN LAZISHVILI IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CABRERA, ARMANDO B CABRERA, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT LAZISHVILI, LEVAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CABRERA, ARMANDO B CABRERA, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT LAZISHVILI, LEVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CABRERA, ARMANDO B CABRERA, MELISSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAZISHVILI, LEVAN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, THE DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS ALREADY PAID PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR $2000. THEREFORE, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN SATISFIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
